title: A bright channel cut through a solid dark block — the one structural opening that the contract declared. There is no other way through; the solid material around the slot is the closed contract boundary. Precept's event declarations are exactly this: not gates that check, but the only structural openings that exist.
conceptualBridge: The sole declared path means Precept's contract is the only route because the opening exists because it was carved by the declaration — everything undeclared is solid material with no opening.
decision: Exploring: avg 4.19 — bright horizontal slot through solid block is highly legible and architecturally specific; conceptually related to 43-void-arrow (carved opening family) but simpler and more abstract; uniqueness score lowered because the void-in-solid family already has 3 candidates; worth keeping for visual economy.
